zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Waldegrave於1437年出生在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親Sir William Waldegrave37歲，母親Joane de Durward37歲。他於大約1457年與Elizabeth Fray結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年4月28日在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗享年35歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Waldegrave于1437年出生在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗时，他的父亲Sir William Waldegrave37岁，母亲Joane de Durward37岁。他于大约1457年与Elizabeth Fray结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年4月28日在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗享年35岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

nameMeanings.name: Waldegrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Walgrave (Northants), which is recorded as Waldgrave in 1086.

variants.name: Woolgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a late variant of   Waldegrave  .

variants.name: Allgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a variant of   Waldegrave  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Waldegrave was born in 1437, in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir William Waldegrave, was 37 and his mother, Joane de Durward, was 37. He married Elizabeth Fray about 1457. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 April 1472, in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Waldegrave est né en 1437, à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Waldegrave, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joane de Durward, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Fray environ 1457. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 avril 1472, à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Waldegrave 1437 in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Waldegrave 37 und seine Mutter Joane de Durward 37. Er hat um 1457 Elizabeth Fray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. April 1472 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Waldegrave è nato il nel 1437 nel Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir William Waldegrave, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Joane de Durward, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Fray circa 1457. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 aprile 1472, nel Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Waldegraveが1437年にイギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーで生まれた時，父Sir William Waldegraveは37歳，母Joane de Durwardは37歳であった。約1457年にElizabeth Frayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年4月28日にイギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーで35歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Waldegrave(이)가 1437년 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Waldegrave(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane de Durward(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1457년 Elizabeth Fray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 4월 28일 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Waldegrave nasceu em 1437, em Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Waldegrave, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Durward, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Fray aproximadamente 1457. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de abril de 1472, em Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Waldegrave родился в 1437 г. в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Waldegrave было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Durward, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Fray около 1457 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 апреля 1472 г. в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Waldegrave nació en 1437, en Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Waldegrave, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Joane de Durward, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Fray aproximadamente 1457. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de abril de 1472, en Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
